notes: v0.16.64 — CLASS page bugfixes + overflow polish. (1) LIVE PREVIEW (middle panel) now reads trail and projectile color for the VIEWED class — pick a SHARD trail/projectile and you see it instantly in the centre preview. (2) ACTIVE chip on the selected class tab no longer overflows below the tab; on horizontal layouts it sits inline-left of the LV chip. (3) MODULES button bottom of LIVE PREVIEW no longer sticks out the screen frame (action row enlarged 38→60 px). (4) Ship icons in pre-match picker tiles slimmed from 56→46 px so premium-FX skins (halo rings, drones, pulses) stay inside the tile. Test mockup at test_track_carousel.tscn shows 3 proposed pre-match track carousels (VINYL DECK / COVER FLOW / PULSE GRID) — pick one and I'll port it. Windows only.
